assignments.direction: Implement a genetic algorithm with permutation-based encoding and standard crossover/mutation operators. Focus on minimizing makespan for small to medium-sized Job Shop Scheduling Problem instances.
Develop a priority rule-based heuristic (e.g., Shortest Processing Time, Earliest Due Date) and evaluate its performance on benchmark instances. Include a local search component to refine schedules.
Explore a tabu search approach with adaptive memory and neighborhood structures tailored for Job Shop Scheduling. Test different tabu tenure strategies.
Implement a constraint programming model using a solver like Google OR-Tools. Focus on leveraging global constraints specific to scheduling problems.
Develop a reinforcement learning agent using a neural network to learn scheduling policies. Use a simple state representation and policy gradient methods.
Explore a particle swarm optimization approach with custom particle encoding for job sequences and velocity updates tailored for scheduling.
Implement a simulated annealing algorithm with a temperature schedule and neighborhood moves designed for Job Shop Scheduling. Test different cooling rates.
Develop a hybrid approach combining a constructive heuristic (e.g., greedy algorithm) with a local search method (e.g., 2-opt or swap moves).
